title: WELLRIDE - 211info
text: YAMHILL COMMUNITY CARE WELLRIDE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF WellRide services are a covered Medicaid benefit for non-emergency medical transportation. Transportation can be scheduled to and from covered medical appointments, including primary care visits, specialist office visits, physical therapy, dental care visits, mental health services, and dialysis. Services include bus fare, pre-approved mileage reimbursement, wheelchair lift/ramp van, taxi cab, stretcher car for those who need to be transported lying down, and secured transport for those in a mental health crisis. If needed, personal care attendants can also ride at no cost. Transportation services are intended to help when no other options are available. Eligibility: OHP members assigned to Yamhill Community Care. Not available for people with CAWM coverage. Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm Email (844) 256-5720 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Customer Service (844) 256-5720 WellRide TTY (Oregon Relay) 711 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call at least 2 days before medical appointment to schedule ride. Bus passes should be requested at least one week before appointment. To cancel trips, call at least 60 minutes ahead of scheduled pick-up time. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Yamhill CCO ID number, home/mailing address and phone number, pick-up address and phone number, appointment address including building name and suite number, appointment date and time, medical provider's name and number, reason for appointment, and if wheelchair or other assistance is needed. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Yamhill County; zip codes 97101, 97119, 97123, 97132, 97137, 97140, 97304, 97347, 97378, and 97396 (Polk and Washington County only) SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed government holidays Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - YAMHILL EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - PRESCHOOL PROMISE FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
